author: vvo
subject: v1.3.3
body: ## [1.3.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.3.2...v1.3.3) (2016-03-07) ### Bug Fixes * **headerFooter:** make collapsible click handler work ([add0d50](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/add0d50)) ### Performance Improvements * **linters:** Greatly improve the `npm run lint` task speed ([1ba53b0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/1ba53b0))
